title: Constraint Action Taxonomy
description: Finite, ordered action types for constraint evaluation decisions.

action_types.description: Constraint satisfied. No impediment to proceeding.
Potential issue identified. Execution may proceed but concern is logged.
Evaluation cannot complete due to missing evidence. Decision deferred.
action_types.note: Fail-closed: if deferred evidence is never provided, escalates to BLOCK.

action_types.description: Decision requires explicit human authority to override or accept risk.
action_types.note: Only a named human with authority can stamp. Anonymous overrides are invalid.

action_types.description: Constraint violated. Execution must not proceed. No override without HUMAN_STAMP.
action_types.note: BLOCK is the fail-closed default for any indeterminate evaluation.

aggregation_rule: Batch evaluation returns the most severe action encountered across all evaluated constraints.
